description_long: This is a freestanding, rectangular washing machine with a slightly weathered, off-white metal exterior. The front features a large, square door with a recessed handle, framed by subtle paneling and some visible grime or wear, suggesting heavy use or outdoor exposure. The top section houses a raised control panel with several round dials and buttons, as well as a central circular feature, possibly a selector or indicator. The sides are plain, showing some surface discoloration and dirt, while the back is mostly flat and open, revealing a recessed area likely for utility connections. The overall build is robust, with a utilitarian design typical of commercial or older residential washing machines. The object appears solid and heavy, with no visible branding or digital displays.
description: A weathered, off-white metal washing machine with a square front door and a raised control panel featuring dials and buttons. The design is utilitarian and robust, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square door with a recessed handle and the raised control panel with dials and buttons above.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, slightly stained metal surface and the protruding control panel at the top rear.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat back with a recessed area, likely for connections, and no visible controls or door.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain, weathered metal surface and the control panel visible at the top rear.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top rear of the machine, raised above the main body. It features several round dials and buttons arranged horizontally, with a central circular feature. No digital display is visible.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, square-shaped metal door with a recessed handle; no window or latch mechanism is visible.
